ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the test case */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the test case for searching */,
  "object" TEXT /* The object or component that the test case interacts with */,
  "proceed_on_fail" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether to proceed to the next step on fail */,
  "data_column_name" TEXT /* Name of the data column associated with the test case */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the test case belongs */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test case */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was last modified */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the test case is executed */,
  "test_script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script associated with the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environment ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_suites" (
  "suite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test suite */,
  "suite_name" TEXT /* Name of the test suite */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test suite's purpose */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test suite was created */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the test suite belongs */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the test suite */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the test suite was last modified */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the test suite is executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_suites_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environment ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result entry */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that was executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date the test case was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case execution (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the test case failed */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite in which the test case was executed */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the test result was recorded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the test result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was recorded */,
  "test_script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script used for the test execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environment ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_defects" (
  "defect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defect */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case that identified the defect */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the defect */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the defect (e.g., Critical, High, Medium, Low) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the defect (e.g., Open, Resolved, Closed) */,
  "test_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result that identified the defect */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the defect */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the defect */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was resolved */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the defect record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the defect was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the defect record */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the defect record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_defects_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES test_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_defects_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES test_users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_defects_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_defects_test_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "requirement_description" TEXT /* Description of the business requirement */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related test case */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the requirement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the requirement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the requirement */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_requirements_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Tester, Developer, Manager) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "execution_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution log */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the executed test case */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date of test execution */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the test case in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution */,
  "test_suite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test suite in which the test case was executed */,
  "test_environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment in which the test case was executed */,
  "test_script_id" INTEGER /* ID of the script used for the test execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment_id") REFERENCES test_environment ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_suite_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_suite_id") REFERENCES test_suites ("suite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_test_script_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_script_id") REFERENCES test_scripts ("script_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_execution_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES test_users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the category was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Staging, Production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the environment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the environment */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the environment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scripts" (
  "script_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each script */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related test case */,
  "script_path" TEXT /* File path to the script */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the script */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the script */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the script was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the script */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the script was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("script_id")
)
